results.title: MRI/linac integration.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 18023488. 2008/01/01 00:00. PURPOSE: To propose a novel magnetic field dose calculation method based on 
transformation from pencil beam (PB) to Monte Carlo (MC) distribution for 
MRI-Linac online treatment planning.
METHODS: The novel magnetic field dose calculation algorithm was established by 
a PB dose engine and a magnetic field with tissue inhomogeneity influence 
correction network. The correction network was constructed with a Res-UNet 
framework, including residual modules an
